title: Week 14 + Project Life Giveaway
excerpt: Another week down, and yes I am still loving every bit of this, even when I get behind. My desk remains a bit of a mess, but it's evidence that there's a lot of working getting done. I'm getting better…
body:
Another week down, and yes I am still loving every bit of this, even when I get behind. My desk remains a bit of a mess, but it's evidence that there's a lot of working getting done. I'm getting better about cleaning up in between projects, but it's all about baby steps when it comes to eradicating bad  habits. At least that is what I tell myself.

After I took photos of the individual pages, I realized I forgot to snap a photo of the desk (I know how much you all enjoy seeing it.) I also found the coffee hugger sleeve from the W Hotel in my purse and decided to add it on top of the cameras.

It was a good week with some delicious meals. In LA, I would highly recommend Tender Greens for lunch, and favorites Gjelina and The Tasting Kitchen for dinner. If you find yourself in Newark, Old Town Sushi has some huge rolls that are an incredible value. And Simply Thai has some darn good dishes. A page I started while at Our Paper Place and finished at home for the garden, copyright Two Peas In A Bucket:

Supplies for layout can be found on Two Peas. Supplies for Project Life: Pebbles corrugated alphabet stickers, glitter Thickers, Studio Calico 6X6 paper pads, Crate Paper, Sketchbook 6X6 paper pad, mostly from Two Peas in A Bucket, some from the local independent stores I visited recently. You can see all my Project Life posts here.

*GIVEAWAY* And now for the really fun stuff... Becky Higgins wants to give one of you this package of Project Life goodness.
